## Title

Brief description of the change or feature.

## Type

- [ ] New agent directory
- [ ] New paper
- [ ] New figure
- [ ] Equation addition (E###)
- [ ] Theorem addition (X.Y)
- [ ] Pattern addition (P###)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Other

## Scope

Which agent area does this affect?

<!-- e.g., Agent 45, Phase 3, Cross-domain -->

## Changes

List the files changed:

- `explorations/XX-description/file.md`
- `papers/file.md`
- `figures/diagrams/file.png`
- `README.md`
- `global-research-log.md`

## Equation Range

- New equations: E###–E###
- New theorems: X.Y–X.Z
- New patterns: P###–P###

## Verification

- [ ] Equation numbers are sequential (check highest number before writing)
- [ ] Theorem numbers follow X.Y format
- [ ] Pattern numbers are sequential (check highest number before writing)
- [ ] Cross-references point to existing equations/theorems/patterns
- [ ] Written in chunks of 25-30 lines
- [ ] agent-handoff.md updated
- [ ] global-research-log.md updated

## Notes

Any additional context for reviewers.
